rounds.theorem_statement: theorem round1_challenge (n : ℤ) (h : n > 0) : (2 * n + 1) ^ 2 - (2 * n - 1) ^ 2 = 8 * n
theorem round2_challenge (a b c : ℝ) (h1 : a + b + c = 0) (h2 : a * b + b * c + c * a = -1) : a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 = 2
rounds.proof: := by nlinarith [sq_nonneg (a + b + c), sq_abs a, sq_abs b, sq_abs c]

rounds.theorem_statement: theorem round3_challenge : ∀ n : ℕ, n ≥ 1 → (∑ i ∈ Finset.range n, (2 * i + 1)) = n ^ 2
rounds.proof:
:= by
  intro n hn
  induction n with
  | zero => omega
  | succ k ih =>
    rw [Finset.sum_range_succ]
    cases k with
    | zero => simp
    | succ m =>
      have hm : m + 1 ≥ 1 := by omega
      rw [ih hm]
      ring

rounds.theorem_statement:
theorem round4_challenge (n : ℕ) (hn : n ≥ 2) : 
  ∃ (a b : ℕ), a ≥ 1 ∧ b ≥ 1 ∧ a + b = n ∧ Nat.Coprime a b
rounds.proof:
:= by
  use 1, n - 1
  refine ⟨le_refl 1, by omega, by omega, ?_⟩
  exact Nat.coprime_one_left (n - 1)

rounds.theorem_statement:
theorem round5_challenge (f : ℤ → ℤ) (hf : ∀ x y : ℤ, f (x + y) + f (x - y) = 2 * f x + 2 * f y) 
  (h0 : f 0 = 0) : ∀ n : ℤ, f n = n ^ 2 * f 1
rounds.proof:
:= by
  have key : ∀ n : ℤ, f (n + 1) + f (n - 1) = 2 * f n + 2 * f 1 := fun n => hf n 1
  have step : ∀ n : ℤ, f (n + 1) = 2 * f n - f (n - 1) + 2 * f 1 := fun n => by linarith [key n]
  have neg : ∀ x : ℤ, f (-x) = f x := by
    intro x; have h2 := hf 0 x; simp [h0] at h2; linarith
  suffices h : ∀ n : ℕ, f (n : ℤ) = (n : ℤ) ^ 2 * f 1 by
    intro n
    obtain ⟨k, rfl | rfl⟩ := Int.eq_nat_or_neg n
    · exact h k
    · rw [neg, h k]; ring
  intro n
  induction n using Nat.strongRecOn with
  | ind n ih =>
    match n with
    | 0 => simp [h0]
    | 1 => simp
    | (k + 2) =>
      have ih1 : f (↑(k + 1) : ℤ) = (↑(k + 1) : ℤ) ^ 2 * f 1 := ih (k + 1) (by omega)
      have ih0 : f (↑k : ℤ) = (↑k : ℤ) ^ 2 * f 1 := ih k (by omega)
      have hstep := step (↑(k + 1) : ℤ)
      have hc1 : (↑(k + 1) : ℤ) - 1 = ↑k := by push_cast; ring
      rw [hc1] at hstep
      have hc2 : (↑(k + 1) : ℤ) + 1 = ↑(k + 2) := by push_cast; ring
      rw [hc2] at hstep
      rw [ih1, ih0] at hstep
      rw [hstep]; push_cast; ring

rounds.theorem_statement:
theorem round6_challenge (f : ℕ → ℤ) (hf : ∀ n, f (n + 2) = 3 * f (n + 1) - 2 * f n)
  (h0 : f 0 = 1) (h1 : f 1 = 3) : ∀ n : ℕ, f n = 2 ^ (n + 1) - 1
rounds.proof:
:= by
  have key : ∀ n : ℕ, f n = 2 ^ (n + 1) - 1 := by
    intro n
    induction n using Nat.strongRecOn with
    | ind n ih =>
      match n with
      | 0 => simp [h0]
      | 1 => simp [h1]
      | (k + 2) =>
        rw [hf k]
        have ih1 := ih (k + 1) (by omega)
        have ih0 := ih k (by omega)
        rw [ih1, ih0]
        have : (2 : ℤ) ^ (k + 2 + 1) = 2 * 2 ^ (k + 1 + 1) := by ring
        push_cast
        ring
  exact key

rounds.theorem_statement:
theorem round7_challenge : ∀ (n : ℕ), n ≥ 1 → 
  3 * (∑ k ∈ Finset.range n, (k + 1) * (k + 2)) = n * (n + 1) * (n + 2)
rounds.proof:
:= by
  intro n hn
  induction n with
  | zero => omega
  | succ m ih =>
    rw [Finset.sum_range_succ, mul_add]
    cases m with
    | zero => simp
    | succ k =>
      rw [ih (by omega)]
      ring

rounds.theorem_statement:
theorem round8_challenge (f : ℤ → ℤ) 
  (h1 : ∀ m n : ℤ, f (m + n) + f (m * n - 1) = f m * f n + 1)
  (h2 : f 0 = 1) (h3 : f 1 = 1) : ∀ n : ℤ, f n = 1
rounds.proof:
:= by
  have hm1 : f (-1) = 1 := by
    have := h1 0 0; simp [h2] at this; linarith
  have recur : ∀ n : ℤ, f (n + 1) + f (n - 1) = f n + 1 := by
    intro n
    have key := h1 1 n
    simp only [h3, one_mul] at key
    have heq : (1 : ℤ) + n = n + 1 := add_comm 1 n
    rw [heq] at key
    linarith
  have hf2 : f 2 = 1 := by
    have := h1 1 1; simp [h3, h2] at this; linarith
  have hm2 : f (-2) = 1 := by
    have hr := recur (-1)
    simp only [show (-1 : ℤ) + 1 = 0 from by ring, show (-1 : ℤ) - 1 = -2 from by ring] at hr
    rw [h2, hm1] at hr; linarith
  suffices hnat : ∀ n : ℕ, f (n : ℤ) = 1 ∧ f (-(n : ℤ)) = 1 by
    intro n
    obtain ⟨k, rfl | rfl⟩ := Int.eq_nat_or_neg n
    · exact (hnat k).1
    · exact (hnat k).2
  intro n
  induction n using Nat.strongRecOn with
  | ind n ih =>
    match n with
    | 0 => exact ⟨h2, by simp [h2]⟩
    | 1 => exact ⟨h3, by simp [hm1]⟩
    | 2 => exact ⟨hf2, by simpa using hm2⟩
    | (k + 3) =>
      have ih2 := (ih (k + 2) (by omega)).1
      have ih1 := (ih (k + 1) (by omega)).1
      have ihn2 := (ih (k + 2) (by omega)).2
      have ihn1 := (ih (k + 1) (by omega)).2
      constructor
      · have hr := recur (↑(k + 2) : ℤ)
        have hc1 : (↑(k + 2) : ℤ) + 1 = ↑(k + 3) := by push_cast; ring
        have hc2 : (↑(k + 2) : ℤ) - 1 = ↑(k + 1) := by push_cast; ring
        rw [hc1, hc2, ih2, ih1] at hr; linarith
      · have hr := recur (-(↑(k + 2) : ℤ))
        have hc3 : -(↑(k + 2) : ℤ) + 1 = -(↑(k + 1) : ℤ) := by push_cast; ring
        have hc4 : -(↑(k + 2) : ℤ) - 1 = -(↑(k + 3) : ℤ) := by push_cast; ring
        rw [hc3, hc4, ihn1, ihn2] at hr; linarith

rounds.theorem_statement:
theorem round9_challenge (g : ℤ → ℤ) 
  (hg : ∀ a b : ℤ, g (a ^ 2 + b) = g (b ^ 2 + a))
  (hg0 : g 0 = 0) : g 1 = g 1 ∧ ∀ n : ℤ, g (n ^ 4 + n) = g (n ^ 2 + n ^ 2)
rounds.proof:
:= by
  constructor
  · rfl
  · intro n
    have h1 := hg (n ^ 2) n
    have h2 := hg n (n ^ 2)
    -- h1: g ((n^2)^2 + n) = g (n^2 + n^2)
    -- h2: g (n^2 + n^2) = g ((n^2)^2 + n)
    -- So g(n^4 + n) = g(n^2 + n^2)
    have : (n ^ 2) ^ 2 = n ^ 4 := by ring
    rw [this] at h1
    exact h1

rounds.theorem_statement:
theorem round10_challenge (f : ℤ → ℤ) 
  (hf1 : ∀ x : ℤ, f (f x) = x + 2)
  (hf2 : f 0 = 1) : ∀ n : ℕ, f (2 * n) = 2 * n + 1 ∧ f (2 * n + 1) = 2 * n + 2
rounds.proof:
:= by
  intro n
  induction n with
  | zero =>
    constructor
    · simpa using hf2
    · have := hf1 0; rw [hf2] at this; simpa using this
  | succ k ih =>
    obtain ⟨ihk1, ihk2⟩ := ih
    have hfk2 : f (2 * ↑k + 2) = 2 * ↑k + 3 := by
      have h := hf1 (2 * ↑k + 1)
      rw [ihk2] at h; linarith
    have hfk3 : f (2 * ↑k + 3) = 2 * ↑k + 4 := by
      have h := hf1 (2 * ↑k + 2)
      rw [hfk2] at h; linarith
    constructor
    · convert hfk2 using 1 <;> push_cast <;> ring
    · convert hfk3 using 1 <;> push_cast <;> ring

:= by
  unfold Nat.Coprime
  induction n with
  | zero => simp
  | succ n ih =>
    rw [Nat.gcd_comm]
    rw [Nat.gcd_rec]
    simp [Nat.add_mod_right]

rounds.theorem_statement: theorem int_sq_add_sq_odd_mod8 (a b : ℤ) (ha : a % 2 = 1) (hb : b % 2 = 1) : (a ^ 2 + b ^ 2) % 8 = 2
rounds.proof:
:= by
  have ha8 : a % 8 = 1 ∨ a % 8 = 3 ∨ a % 8 = 5 ∨ a % 8 = 7 := by omega
  have hb8 : b % 8 = 1 ∨ b % 8 = 3 ∨ b % 8 = 5 ∨ b % 8 = 7 := by omega
  have key_a : a ^ 2 % 8 = 1 := by
    have eq_a : a = 8 * (a / 8) + a % 8 := (Int.ediv_add_emod a 8).symm
    rcases ha8 with h | h | h | h <;> (rw [eq_a, h]; ring_nf; omega)
  have key_b : b ^ 2 % 8 = 1 := by
    have eq_b : b = 8 * (b / 8) + b % 8 := (Int.ediv_add_emod b 8).symm
    rcases hb8 with h | h | h | h <;> (rw [eq_b, h]; ring_nf; omega)
  omega

rounds.theorem_statement: theorem list_length_filter_le (l : List ℕ) (p : ℕ → Bool) : (l.filter p).length ≤ l.length
theorem nat_prime_not_dvd_of_lt (p n : ℕ) (hp : p.Prime) (hn : 0 < n) (hlt : n < p) : ¬ p ∣ n
rounds.proof:
:= by
  intro h
  have := Nat.le_of_dvd hn h
  omega

rounds.theorem_statement:
theorem sum_arithmetic_progression (n : ℕ) (a d : ℤ) : 
    2 * (Finset.range n).sum (fun i => a + d * i) = n * (2 * a + d * (n - 1))
rounds.proof:
:= by
  induction n with
  | zero => simp
  | succ n ih =>
    rw [Finset.sum_range_succ]
    push_cast
    linarith

rounds.theorem_statement: theorem prod_range_add_one (n : ℕ) : ∏ i ∈ Finset.range n, (i + 1 : ℕ) = n.factorial
rounds.proof:
:= by
  induction n with
  | zero => simp
  | succ n ih =>
    rw [Finset.prod_range_succ, ih, Nat.factorial_succ, Nat.mul_comm]

rounds.theorem_statement: theorem int_sq_mod8_cases (n : ℤ) : n ^ 2 % 8 = 0 ∨ n ^ 2 % 8 = 1 ∨ n ^ 2 % 8 = 4
rounds.proof:
:= by
  have hn : n % 8 = 0 ∨ n % 8 = 1 ∨ n % 8 = 2 ∨ n % 8 = 3 ∨ n % 8 = 4 ∨ 
            n % 8 = 5 ∨ n % 8 = 6 ∨ n % 8 = 7 ∨
            n % 8 = -1 ∨ n % 8 = -2 ∨ n % 8 = -3 ∨ n % 8 = -4 ∨
            n % 8 = -5 ∨ n % 8 = -6 ∨ n % 8 = -7 := by omega
  have key : n ^ 2 % 8 = (n % 8) ^ 2 % 8 := by
    conv_lhs => rw [show n = 8 * (n / 8) + n % 8 from (Int.ediv_add_emod n 8).symm]
    ring_nf
    omega
  rw [key]
  rcases hn with h | h | h | h | h | h | h | h | h | h | h | h | h | h | h <;>
    simp [h]
